title: Coupon applicability catalogue
description: Every valid applicability + its required companion fields + the target types it accepts. The valid_applicability_consistency rule reads this catalogue. CouponRedemptionObserver uses it to gate applicability at redemption time.

applicabilities.description: Applies to any invoice/membership/transaction line. No restrictions beyond usage_cap + per_customer_limit + valid window.
applicabilities.typical_use_case: Site-wide promotions (SUMMER25) — anyone can redeem on any purchase.

applicabilities.description: Applies only when applied_to_type='membership'. Refuses invoice + transaction targets. Useful for subscription-specific promotions.
applicabilities.typical_use_case: Membership retention: 'first_month_free' or 'free_period' applied only to subscription renewals, never to one-off purchases.

applicabilities.description: Applies only when applied_to_type='membership' AND the target membership's plan_id is in the coupon's applicable_plan_ids array. Requires non-empty applicable_plan_ids. Refuses membership targets on non-listed plans.

applicable_plan_ids.description: Array of MembershipPlan IDs. FK-validated at coupon-create time — refuses non-existent plans.

applicabilities.typical_use_case: Plan-specific promotions: 'Premium tier upgrade 25% off' targeting only the Premium plan ID.
applicabilities.notes: bogo discount_type requires this applicability (applicable_plan_ids must be non-empty).

applicabilities.description: Applies to any invoice/transaction with source_amount_cents >= minimum_order_amount in the matching currency. Requires both minimum_order_amount + minimum_order_currency.

minimum_order_currency.description: ISO 4217. Must match the target's source_currency at redemption time — currency mismatch refuses.

applicabilities.typical_use_case: '$10 off orders over $50' — SUMMER10 with minimum_order_amount=5000, minimum_order_currency='USD'.
applicabilities.notes: Compared against source_amount_cents BEFORE discount — the customer's cart value, not the post-discount amount.

notes: applicability + applicable_plan_ids + minimum_order_amount + minimum_order_currency internal consistency is enforced by the valid_applicability_consistency rule at request-validation + observer time.
bogo discount_type FORCES applicability='specific_membership_plans' — the observer refuses bogo with any other applicability.
first_month_free discount_type FORCES applicability IN ('membership_only', 'specific_membership_plans') — invoices + transactions have no 'first month' concept.
free_period discount_type FORCES applicability IN ('membership_only', 'specific_membership_plans') — same reason.
